name: Approximating SPR Distance Between Phylogenetic Trees with Graph Neural Networks

description: arXiv:2607.18311v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Comparing phylogenetic tree topologies is essential for understanding epidemic dynamics, yet biologically meaningful distances such as the Subtree Prune and Regraft (SPR) distance are NP-hard to compute and intractable on large datasets. We investigate whether a Graph Neural Network (GNN) can approximate SPR distances in near-constant time per c...
author: Renata Martins Castanheira, Miguel Bugalho, C\'atia Vaz
